testcase.name: test_tools_node_executes_create_task_and_persists
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_hermes_ultra.py:250: in test_tools_node_executes_create_task_and_persists get_db().tasks.find_one({"title": title}) /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/motor/metaprogramming.py:74: in method return framework.run_on_executor( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/motor/frameworks/asyncio/__init__.py:85: in run_on_executor return loop.run_in_executor(_EXECUTOR, functools.partial(fn, *args, **kwargs)) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:817: in run_in_executor self._check_closed() /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:520: in _check_closed raise RuntimeError('Event loop is closed') E RuntimeError: Event loop is closed

testcase.name: test_real_tools_no_mock_field

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False is True + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9b5312cf240>('ok') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9b5312cf240> = {'error': 'Event loop is closed', 'ok': False}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_hermes_ultra.py:288: in test_real_tools_no_mock_field assert res.get("ok") is True E AssertionError: assert False is True E + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9b5312cf240>('ok') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9b5312cf240> = {'error': 'Event loop is closed', 'ok': False}.get

testcase.name: test_ultra_persists_session_messages
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_hermes_ultra.py:315: in test_ultra_persists_session_messages msgs = loop.run_until_complete( /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:654: in run_until_complete return future.result() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/agents/memory.py:68: in get_session doc = await db.sessions.find_one({"session_id": session_id}, {"_id": 0, "messages": 1}) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/motor/metaprogramming.py:74: in method return framework.run_on_executor( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/motor/frameworks/asyncio/__init__.py:85: in run_on_executor return loop.run_in_executor(_EXECUTOR, functools.partial(fn, *args, **kwargs)) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:817: in run_in_executor self._check_closed() /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:520: in _check_closed raise RuntimeError('Event loop is closed') E RuntimeError: Event loop is closed
